reviews.review_heading: My college through my eyes.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there are many facilities. Most of the classes are air-conditioned. All classrooms are camera-protected. All the classrooms and labs are well-furnished. There is a very good mess and canteen in our college with reasonable prices for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for middle class student.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi quality is very good and the speed is very fast. The classrooms are air-conditioned. The library is quite good and the silence makes everyone learn. In the labs, we have more than 100 computer systems for every student, and computer labs are also air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: My college role in my success journey.
reviews.review_text: This college infrastructure for my course B.Sc. was very good and enough. The college provided all facilities for science students. reviews.review_heading: A memorable college life.
reviews.review_text: My course was an M.Sc. in Mathematics. There were well-developed rooms, labs, and classrooms in our college. Facilities of a library and Wi-Fi were also provided in our college. It had a big playground with all the sports materials. There was no hostel facility in our college.

Apart from that, the college has a clean and disciplined campus, and living spaces are good, and the food is hygienic.

The college crowd is very big. The college atmosphere is very good.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college in your opinion!

The hostels are neat, clean, and wel...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Agrawal P.G. College.
reviews.review_text: Good and excellent service they provided us. Lots of facilities like drinking water, toilets cleanliness, and hygiene. Campus to explore for the students for enjoyment purposes. Renovated sports turf for the welfare of students. Our college is provided with all the facilities and equipment. College's infrastructure is really so great, it gives access to everything to students: classrooms, library, sports centers, canteen, hostel. College is so well-maintained and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Agrawal P.G. College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. In my college, there are good classrooms, a good library, Wi-Fi labs, and AC rooms available. Hostels are also very good. Hostel food is okay. Medical facility is available in my college 24 hours. The college design is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Agrawal PG college review.
reviews.review_text: Yes, my college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities, and equipment. The facilities are good; classrooms are clean and well-equipped; and libraries are good, but we don't need labs. Yes, the living places are clean, but the food is somewhat unhealthy.

reviews_list.review_title: If you are serious about your career, then the course will teach you a lot of stuff.

review_content.Placements: Right now, I'm in the third year. There are some companies that come to our college for recruiting employees, like banks, hotels, and corporate companies. The interviews are held in the college seminar hall. Interested students give interviews and are also recruited. Only 2 to 3 percent of students get recruited.
review_content.Infrastructure: One thing I can guarantee about the campus is that it has amazing infrastructure and all the facilities, including a library, science labs, and computer labs. As for the hostel department, there is only a boys' hostel available for the students. They used to have a girls' hostel, but it is currently closed due to fewer girls opting for the college hostel. Mostly, girls prefer to stay at PGs available in the locality.

review_content.Infrastructure: The department provides us with excellent facilities, including a seminar hall, clean classrooms, computer labs, and a well-stocked library. Every Saturday, they conduct seminars that provide us with knowledge about different programs. They also arrange certification courses for us, such as Tally and LearnEarn.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (B.C.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Average teaching and weak support.

content.Placements: Placements at Maulana Azad College for the BCA course are very poor in my experience. The college does not provide proper campus recruitment support, and very few reputed companies visit. Most students have to search for jobs on their own, and the guidance for interviews or skill development is almost non-existent.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Maulana Azad College is below expectations for a professional course like BCA. Many classrooms are outdated, with poor seating. The hostel facilities are even more disappointing. Rooms are cramped, with old furniture and no proper cleanliness. Washrooms are hygienic, and water supply issues are common. The hostel's mess food is of poor quality and repetitive, with very little nutritional variety. Security arrangements are basic, and the environment does not feel completely safe.

individual_reviews.title: It's better to do Masters after a degree for better placement, but faculty is very good.

content.Placements: It's better to go for higher learning after graduation. We visited companies twice, and it was very helpful to concentrate and decide on our goals. I don't know about the companies' packages. All the students who want to go for internships can, and even teachers can help them with it.
content.Infrastructure: We have our own lab of biotechnology and a separate department for students. We have all the facilities to be a student of biotech. In the college library, all the books are available to study the syllabus deeply. The campus has a medical department too, and they arrange sports day. All the games are available, both indoors and outdoors.

individual_reviews.title: If you are serious about your career, then the course will teach you a lot of stuff.

content.Placements: Right now, I'm in the third year. There are some companies that come to our college for recruiting employees, like banks, hotels, and corporate companies. The interviews are held in the college seminar hall. Interested students give interviews and are also recruited. Only 2 to 3 percent of students get recruited.
content.Infrastructure: One thing I can guarantee about the campus is that it has amazing infrastructure and all the facilities, including a library, science labs, and computer labs. As for the hostel department, there is only a boys' hostel available for the students. They used to have a girls' hostel, but it is currently closed due to fewer girls opting for the college hostel. Mostly, girls prefer to stay at PGs available in the locality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Fully satisfied with the faculty and really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: I graduated from this course with an 84% average. The top roles offered in the course were HR and accountant. After completing the course, I joined Softclove Pvt Ltd, where I was responsible for digital marketing and advising clients on how to promote their businesses digitally.
content.Infrastructure: The department provides us with excellent facilities, including a seminar hall, clean classrooms, computer labs, and a well-stocked library. Every Saturday, they conduct seminars that provide us with knowledge about different programs. They also arrange certification courses for us, such as Tally and LearnEarn.

individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges for students, especially for minorities.

content.Placements: Students who score good marks get many opportunities and very good chances to get job offers from the best companies. Our college provided skill development training from the renowned company named Infosys recently. After completing the training students got certificates and books from Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are spacious, open, and properly ventilated. Each class is sufficient for 100 students to comfortably sit and learn. The library is very good and has informative books. Lab is very good and has many things. All the students get a chance to perform practicals in the labs. Hostel facility is available for all the students. There are two boys' hostels and a girls' hostel. Hostel charges are low and affordable. Canteen provides very good snacks like tea, biscuits, coffee, fritters, Poha, Bhel, samosa, dosa, sambhar vada, chips, ice creams, and other soft drinks. Many hotels and restaurants are available in front of the college that serves very good food of different cuisine. Many facilities are available nearby like a mall, clothes shop, grocery shop, stationary, etc. There is a huge playground in our college for students to play different sports and games and teachers encourage them to take part in the activities. Annual sports day is organised in winter and different programs are organised throughout the year like singing competitions, drawing, poster making, poetry, speech, sab rang, food, etc.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology srinagar?
faqs.answer: Hello Nishar Ahmed, National Institute of Electronics and Information technology is an autonomous institute working under the ministry of information and technology of the government of india. It has campuses spread across India at 41 locations. It is basically involved in skill development activity meaning it provides many courses of small duration to students who then can either seek employment or they can work themselves as entrepreneurs. In addition to this these institutes also offer some courses at graduation and post graduation levels also. These courses are invariably affiliated to the local government university where these institutes are located. In such cases the University grants a degree or postgraduate certificate. Having spread across India and also being involved in providing computer and information technology related training to the students, all institutes together have an online placement cell. All students belonging to any of these 41 campuses can upload their CVs and then the prospective employers can come and interview them at each of the campuses and select candidates for recruitment. As the institute is offering courses which are of duration of few weeks basically skill important courses and also of 4 years graduation and 2 years of post graduation the placements also work in that direction and the packages which are offered are also dependent on the qualification that has been earned by the student. Those in the graduation and post graduation bracket are reported to have obtained packages to the tune of 10 lakhs to 15 lakhs per annum. On the other hand, for those students who have just completed courses which have given them some skills, the packages are from INR 100000 to about INR 4 Lakhs per annum. Best wishes to you.

faqs.question: Is National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology srinagar good for placements?
faqs.answer: The National Institute of Technology (NIT) Srinagar offers reasonably good placements. As per the trends of previous years, 60-70% of the total students get a decent placement through this in-house recruitment. The average salary packages offered differ from one course to another course The highest salary package offered is 46 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 8 LPA. faqs.question: How many seats are available at YD Mane Institute of Pharmacy for all courses combined?

faqs.question: How can I get into YD Mane Institute of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
